name: Pasta with Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 1 can Hunt's "Light" fat-free spaghetti sauce (26.75 oz)
1 packet Weight Watcher's brand fat-free Parmesan cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. Bring a large pot of water to boil for the pasta.
2. While the water is heating, prepare the vegetables: wash and cut the onion into quarters, then slice about 3/4 inch thick; remove stem, seeds, and soft parts from the bell pepper, then cut into bite-sized pieces; halve or quarter larger mushrooms and cut zucchini in half lengthwise, slicing 1/2 inch thick.
3. Add the pasta to the boiling water and cook according to package instructions until al dente (usually 10-12 minutes).
4. Drain the pasta and divide it onto serving plates.
5. Stir the spaghetti sauce over medium heat until warmed through.
6. Combine the cooked pasta with the sauce in a skillet or directly on plates, stirring to coat evenly.
7. Sprinkle the Parmesan cheese and Italian topping generously over the pasta to taste.
Makes 2 large servings or 3 smaller servings. Total cooking time is under 20 minutes. No added fat.
